title: 谋杀启事
summary:
Miss Blacklock presents a letter to Philippa, prompting Philippa to call Patrick and Julia downstairs to the living room. After reading the letter, Patrick admits to being part of a deception and realizes he should have wired his sister. Miss Blacklock confronts Patrick regarding the identity of the young woman brought to the house as Julia Simmons' niece. Patrick explains that the real Julia wanted to pursue acting in Perth and had pretended to train as a pharmacist to avoid upsetting her mother.

Julia enters the room and confesses that she is actually Emma Joachim Stanfordshire, one half of a duo known as "Pip and Emma." Emma explains that her father was an unreliable man who often abandoned her at convents. Having worked with the French Resistance, Emma sought to secure her future by targeting Miss Blacklock, whom she believed would inherit a large fortune with no heirs. Emma met Patrick by chance and convinced him to help her impersonate Julia. She claims she only maintained the ruse to avoid suspicion following a robbery and to keep a low profile during the investigation into the murder attempts. When questioned about "Pip," Emma claims she has not seen him since they were three years old. Emma asserts she is a skilled marksman but denies attempting to kill Miss Blacklock.

The confrontation is interrupted by the arrival of the police. Mickey announces their presence, and Inspector Corrado enters. Corrado informs the group that Miss Muggleton has been murdered by strangulation within the last hour and immediately directs his suspicion toward Julia, questioning her whereabouts.
